description: A play runs against the full inventory including production, applying broad changes with no gate.
body: Failure mode: a playbook is run without --limit or environment separation, so a change intended for staging also hits production with maximum blast radius and no approval. Detection signals: production hosts appearing in a run meant for testing; an over-broad --limit pattern matching prod; the same inventory mixing environments. Do not run broadly against mixed inventory. Safer fallback: separate prod and non-prod inventories, scope with --tags and --limit, dry-run with --check first, and gate any production apply on explicit human approval.
